---
title: "Neuro-oncology Complications and Emergencies"
category: "Specialty Topics"
section_id: "neurooncology"
last_updated: "2026-07-01"
source: "UF Neurology Resident Handbook 2026-2027"
---

# Neuro-oncology Complications and Emergencies

**Neuro-oncology Emergencies**

**Common Medical Complications of Brain Tumors**
